Description: Upload a medical document. Returns immediately with report_id. Processing happens asynchronously.
Body: file: binary (PDF|JPG|PNG, max 10MB), report_type: one of the 13 MVP types or 'imaging_report' | 'other', display_name: string (optional)

Response 202 (image_only).message: Image stored. Please also upload the written report from your radiologist for AI explanation.
